text:
I also noticed that reports directory contains more languages than we install:
ca.html
de.html
en.html
fr.html
it.html
nl_NL.html
pl.html
sk.html
zh_CN.html

REPORT_LANG=	ca de en it pl

Not sure what those reports are and how to use them, so didn't touch this part.
